task_completion.description: Agent logged into the OpenClinica web application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window displaying the OpenClinica interface (dashboard, study setup, or subject matrix) indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent created or opened the target report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, mousepad) or terminal window editing a file named 'enrollment_reconciliation.txt' in the ~/Documents directory.

task_completion.description: The report contains the '=== STUDY INFORMATION ===' section with the correct Principal Investigator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text file contents for the header '=== STUDY INFORMATION ===' and verify it includes 'Dr. Sarah Chen' as the Principal Investigator.

task_completion.description: The report contains the '=== ENROLLED SUBJECTS ===' section with the 5 expected subjects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text file contents for the header '=== ENROLLED SUBJECTS ===' and verify it lists 5 subjects (DM-101, DM-102, DM-103, DM-104, DM-105) with their respective Gender, DOB, and Status.

task_completion.description: The report contains the '=== EVENT DEFINITIONS ===' section with the 3 expected events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text file contents for the header '=== EVENT DEFINITIONS ===' and verify it lists 'Screening Visit', 'Baseline Assessment', and 'Week 4 Follow-up' with their Type and Repeating status.

task_completion.description: The report contains the '=== STUDY USERS ===' section with the 3 expected users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text file contents for the header '=== STUDY USERS ===' and verify it lists the users 'root', 'mrivera', and 'lchang' with their roles.

integrity.description: Agent extracted data via the application interface, not direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure the agent did not use 'psql' or other database command-line tools to query the PostgreSQL database directly.

integrity.description: Agent navigated the OpenClinica web interface to gather the required data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent viewing different pages in OpenClinica, such as the Subject Matrix, Build Study/Event Definitions, and Users pages.

integrity.description: Agent saved the output to the requested file rather than just printing it to the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the text is written into a file editor or saved via a command that writes to 'enrollment_reconciliation.txt', rather than just being echoed to the terminal stdout without redirection.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file is /home/ga/Documents/enrollment_reconciliation.txt. The Principal Investigator is exactly 'Dr. Sarah Chen'. There are 5 expected subjects: DM-101 (Female, 1968-03-22), DM-102 (Male, 1952-11-07), DM-103 (Female, 1980-07-14), DM-104 (Male, 1945-09-30), DM-105 (Female, 1973-06-12). There are 3 expected events: Screening Visit (Scheduled, No), Baseline Assessment (Scheduled, No), Week 4 Follow-up (Scheduled, Yes). There are 3 expected users: root (director), mrivera (data_manager), lchang (monitor).
